lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket
lines.text: You need help JalYt-[TzHaar caste]-[player name]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why can't I go past here?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket
lines.text: This area closed to JalYt.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why's that?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket
lines.text: JalYt are not trusted. Nor are capable of withstanding the heat. The features of the city are a secret.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's a shame.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What if I could prove that I am capable?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket
lines.text: [TzHaar caste]-[player name], I suppose that is perfectly acceptable, but it would take lots to convince.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How about a large stack of coins.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket
lines.text: Gold is bad currency, I have no use for JalYt coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I managed to defeat TzTok-Jad and obtain this firecape.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket
lines.text: That is most impressive [TzHaar caste]-[player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Surely this proves I am capable? Can I pleeease come through now?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket
lines.text: I suppose so, I'll grant you access to Mor Ul Rek. The guards will open the gates for you, you are the first JalYt to pass these gates!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I don't think I am capable.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm a hardened adventurer, nothing can stop me!

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket
lines.text: Back off JalYt-[TzHaar caste]-[player name], trust me when I say our obsidian bodies are harder.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you guarding?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket
lines.text: Ah, trusted and most capable JalYt, this is the city of Mor Ul Rek. It has grand central inferno, our birthing pool. Go! See for yourself [TzHaar caste]-[player name]

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket
lines.text: [TzHaar caste]-[player name], you are not trusted, this is secret area. Less questions! I will say that it's the inner core of the city though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh well, goodbye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh well, [TzHaar caste]-[Player name] over and out.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket
lines.text: Haha funny JalYt try to speak language, why do you put that accent on when attempting it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: maybe it helps you to understand what I'm saying. See you around.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket
lines.text: Are you not [TzHaar caste]-[player name]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's a '[TzHaar caste]'?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket
lines.text: That what you are... you tough and strong no?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket
lines.text: That what you are... you user of mystic powers, no?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket
lines.text: That what you are... you agile and quick no?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket
lines.text: That what you are... you skilled at making things no?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well yes I suppose I am...

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket
lines.text: Then you [TzHaar caste]!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you then?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket
lines.text: Silly JalYt, I am TzHaar-Ket, one of the guardians of our city.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket
lines.text: There are the wise TzHaar-Mej who guide us, the swift TzHaar-Xil who hunt for our food, and the skilled TzHaar-Hur who craft our homes and tools.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for explaining it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I guess so...

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket
lines.text: Well then, no problems.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No I'm not!

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket
lines.text: What ever you say, crazy JalYt!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No I'm fine thanks.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket
lines.text: Hello JalYt-[TzHaar caste]-[player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket
lines.text: You need help little JalYt?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not unless you can help me in the Inferno.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket
lines.text: It is not for us to help. You must fight alone.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh... Worth a try I suppose.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket
lines.text: Kot e TzHaar-Hur!

sections.title: Catching players attempting to steal from stalls in Mor Ul Rek

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket
lines.text: Oi JalYt!
